title: sida subtriloba
intro: Sida subtriloba, also known as the three-angled sida or sida plant, is a species of flowering plant in the mallow family (Malvaceae) that is native to tropical Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can be used to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The health benefits of Sida subtriloba include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and protect against oxidative stress. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction or infusion, and is also used in herbal remedies in the form of a paste or ointment.
